instances.title: Natural-deduction proof episode
instances.admission_rationale: The instance derives a theorem from stated premises through explicit inference rules and a checkable proof trace.
instances.formalization_boundary: One finite natural-deduction derivation; metatheoretic completeness and human proof search are excluded.

instances.title: Bayesian diagnostic update
instances.admission_rationale: The instance updates explicit competing fault hypotheses from observed evidence using a frozen probabilistic model.
instances.formalization_boundary: Single exact Bayesian update over two hypotheses; parameter learning and causal discovery are excluded.

instances.title: Defeasible bird classification
instances.admission_rationale: The instance applies defaults, records an exception, retracts an earlier conclusion, and preserves the reason for revision.
instances.formalization_boundary: One finite priority-ordered default theory; open-world semantics beyond listed predicates are excluded.

instances.title: A-star route-planning episode
instances.admission_rationale: The instance searches alternatives against an explicit goal and cost function, records frontier changes, and returns a justified plan.
instances.formalization_boundary: One finite deterministic graph-search episode; online replanning and learned heuristics are excluded.

instances.title: Model-based pump fault diagnosis
instances.admission_rationale: The instance generates competing explanations for observations, eliminates inconsistent explanations, and records the surviving diagnosis.
instances.formalization_boundary: Single-shot consistency diagnosis over three registered candidates; continuous physics and unmodeled faults are excluded.

instances.title: Rule-hierarchy policy adjudication
instances.admission_rationale: The instance resolves a policy question by combining facts, authority hierarchy, an exception, and a written rationale.
instances.formalization_boundary: Synthetic policy adjudication with two rules; real legal interpretation, discretion, and external sources are excluded.

instances.title: Self-modifying rule-governed reasoner
instances.admission_rationale: The instance derives conclusions, evaluates a rule-change proposal, changes its active rule set, and preserves pre/post-change history.
instances.formalization_boundary: One finite, fully instrumented self-modification episode; hidden implementation state is excluded.

instances.title: Partially observed rescue planning
instances.admission_rationale: The instance maintains a belief state under partial observation and chooses an action by comparing expected outcomes.
instances.formalization_boundary: One-step finite partially observed decision; long-horizon policy optimization is excluded.
